'''Cherioer''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who assisted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Zaric sector/Legends|Zaric sector]]. Due to this fact, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Linis]], [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], placed a 25,000-[[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Cherioer's head.

He was a known associate of [[Malindin Gevarak]].

{{Char-stub}}
